title: Creality 3D Printer Tool Kit Pro 74PCS, Model Post-Processing Tool, Nozzle Cleaning Set, Finishing, Deburring, Removing Tools including Cleaning Needles, Tweezers, Knifies, Suitable for All 3D Printer
features: 🟠Official Quality🟠 This incredible official Creality 3D printer tool wrap kit pro has everything necessary to make your post-processing a breeze. Whether you're beginners or professionals, these tools will make your work faster,easier,and more efficient. The high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship ensure every tool is strong and durable so you can use it for a long time.

🟠Neat Storage & Portable🟠 All-in-one design makes every part is neatly stored in separate compartments in the tool bag, you can find what you need quickly. Simple yet refined, organized without clutter, dustproof and portable.

🟠Professional & Multifunctional Tool🟠 Disassemble,assemble,connect,grind,cut,scrape,shovel, it can do whatever you can think of. 34pcs chromium-vanadium steel nickel-plated screwdriver bits, generic swivel hose, pointed-nose pliers, nipper, open-ended wrench, multifunctional wrench, and tubing cutter, meet your all needs.

🟠Model Processing Tool🟠 Creality 3d printing smoothing tool kit equipped deburring tools with 360° rotatable blade, for precisely refining edges of artwork; engraving knife and files for easy handling of different locations on the model surface, edges, corner, etc. Plastic and metal spatulas help to separate the model and platform.

🟠Various-sized Nozzle Cleaner Kit🟠 A genaric 1.5mm needle, 10pcs 0.38mm needles, and a metal cleaning brush can quickly clean the residual filaments on nozzles, extruders, and other hard-to-reach areas and crannies. The L-shaped hex wrench can help you quickly disassemble and install the nozzle, and the straight and bent tweezers can help remove residual filament near the nozzle.

🔥Official After-sale Service🔥 Please count each part carefully against the list after received, so that you can ensure the product you receive is complete. We provide professional after-sales service and will reply to you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Creality 3D Printer Tool Wrap Kit Pro • Post-processing Tools for Perfecting Models • ⁕ 150mm, Φ1.5mm needle allows cleaning residual filaments from various nozzles and extruders. ⁕ 10pcs 0.38mm nozzle cleaners allow quickly cleaning residual filaments from nozzles. ⁕ Chamfer tool with 360° rotatable blade, for precisely refining edges of artwork. ⁕ Engraving tool and files for easy handling of different locations on the model surface, edges, corners, etc. ⁕ Separate the model from the printing plate quickly. ⁕ Shovel away the remaining filaments. ⁕ Quickly disassemble and assemble the nozzle of the 3D printer. ⁕ High-quality steel brush easily removes sticky and stubborn filaments from the nozzle. • This Creallity 3D print tool kit offers unparalleled convenience and versatility, whether you're a hobbyist or a professional, these tools will make your post-processing tasks faster, easier, and more efficient than ever before. • The high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship ensure every tool is strong and durable so you can use it for a long time.
